title: taraxacum helveticum
intro: Taraxacum helveticum, also known as the Alpine dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like potassium and iron, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Taraxacum helveticum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
